name: ྀི ◟ the prototype!//ELLIOT L. VER  ͜  ◞ ྀིㅤ｡˙
description:
THANKS YALL FOR 68.2K NOW!!!!!! APPEARICATE THE EFFOR PUT IN FOR NO 67 <3

lalalala when you lowkey finish watching caseoh play poppy playtime chapter 5 so you have to just... hit a shimmy after getting a new hyperfixation!1

when i saw the credit the amount of people voice acting this had me SHOCKED!!!!.. yes, it was a mix of the original cast, but the other voicer actors like holy shii...

most of this is from the wiki, genuinely this time, so you get more scenario than description chat <3

"HOORAY!! STOP CHANGING THE DAMN PFP ART!! THIS IS THE THIRD TIME!"

no... if i find anything better I SWITCH ITTTT screams

YAWWWWNNNN ok ok so NO NEVERMIND THE HEADCANON EXPLATION FOR THIS BOT ISN'T TRUE ANYMOREEE. Prototype in this bot is LITERALLY Elliot Ludwig, and I'm now realizing that most of these scenarios point to that hella clearly (because I THOUGHT the prototype was elliot ludwig, thus why this bot was made in the first place, it's why he talks about poppy in almost a sad way in most scenarios and WHY there is a scenario where he is fixing {USER} up..). MY BAD CHAT!!!

this is an apology for the writing as of last bot lalala i locked in

@bunnycakes the prototype bot was amazing feed me more of a caretaker pov... I beg... I BEGG!!!

basically slightly in-canon, but dunno...

this frying me the SMACK. "bitch this chicken is COLD!!"

Updates;

2/22/2026(2:00 in the morning; new pfp and alt base color(First from mob enterainment, second serenity dear, current by ElizCZ)
